name: Monorepo - Web (App Service)
description: Node.js + Express on Azure App Service. Part of the monorepo-templates repo; after init, change into the web/ folder to run azd up.

name: Monorepo - API (Container Apps)
description: Node.js + Express on Azure Container Apps with Docker. Part of the monorepo-templates repo; after init, change into the api/ folder to run azd up.
